testcase.name: [It] NetworkPolicy Cross-namespace connectivity WHEN no NetworkPolicy THEN ALLOW cross-namespace pod connectivity

testcase.name: [It] NetworkPolicy AWS-IMDS global policy access denied THEN DENY access to AWS IMDS
[It] NetworkPolicy AWS-IMDS access permitted namespace THEN ALLOW access to AWS IMDS
[It] NetworkPolicy Cross-namespace connectivity WITH Cloud Platform default deny policy THEN DENY cross-namespace traffic
[It] GIVEN VPC endpoints are configured THEN ALLOW connectivity to all AWS services via VPC endpoints
[It] NetworkPolicy Cross-namespace connectivity WITH Cloud Platform default deny policy WITH cross-namespace allow policy THEN ALLOW traffic between namespaces
[It] NetworkPolicy Internet access default allowed THEN ALLOW internet access by default
[It] GIVEN VPC endpoints are configured THEN all AWS services resolve to internal VPC addresses
[It] GIVEN a gatekeeper installation THEN return all expected constraints
